q1.q: Is there a free trial? Do I need a credit card?
q1.a: Yes — every plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.

q2.a: WhatsApp, Telegram, Basalam, Digikala, and Bale. More integrations are added regularly based on customer demand.

q3.q: How does the AI assistant work?
q3.a: The AI reads incoming messages, detects intent (pricing, shipping, returns, etc.), and sends pre-configured replies automatically. You control what it says and when.

q4.q: Can multiple team members use the same account?
q4.a: Yes. All plans support multiple users with role-based access. Invite your team, assign conversations, and track performance together.

q5.a: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell or share your data with third parties.

q6.q: Can I change my plan later?
q6.a: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade at any time from Settings → Billing. Changes take effect immediately.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for the Kalahamoon Browser Extension

intro.title: Scope
intro.content: This Privacy Policy explains how the Kalahamoon Browser Extension collects, uses, and protects information when you install or use the extension on supported websites. It applies specifically to the extension and its related Kalahamoon services used to authenticate your account, process product captures, and deliver requested features.

collect.title: Information We Access
collect.content: The extension may access the active page, selected product links, page content, images, prices, product descriptions, variants, and technical page signals required to identify supported marketplaces and extract product information at your request. If you sign in, Kalahamoon also stores account and session data needed to keep the extension connected to your workspace.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.content: We use this information only to provide extension features such as detecting supported stores, extracting product data, checking duplicate captures, sending products to destinations you configure, generating affiliate links where available, and maintaining account access, security, and operational reliability. We do not use captured product data for advertising or unrelated profiling.

sharing.title: How Information Is Shared
sharing.content: We do not sell personal information. Information is shared only when necessary to operate the extension, such as with Kalahamoon backend services, destination platforms you explicitly connect or choose for product export, and service providers that support secure hosting and delivery of the service.

security.title: Permissions and Security
security.content: The extension requests browser permissions such as active tab access, supported site access, storage, context menus, notifications, scripting, clipboard write, tabs, identity, and alarms solely to enable its documented features. We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards, including authenticated access controls and encrypted network transmission where supported, to help protect stored and transmitted data.

rights.title: Your Choices and Rights
rights.content: You can stop collection by disabling or uninstalling the extension at any time. You can also disconnect your Kalahamoon account, remove stored browser data through your browser settings, and contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of personal information associated with your account, subject to legal and operational requirements.

contact.title: Data We Do Not Intentionally Collect and Contact
contact.content: The extension is not designed to collect unrelated personal messages, passwords, payment card details, or private form input unless that information is part of product content you intentionally ask the extension to process on a supported page. If you have questions, requests, or concerns about this policy, contact us at support@kalahamoon.com or through https://kalahamoon.com.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Kalahamoon, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Kalahamoon provides an AI-powered CRM platform for sales teams, including unified messaging, pipeline management, and automation tools.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our platform in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You may not use the service for any unlawful purpose.

payment.title: Billing & Payments
payment.content: Paid plans are billed according to the pricing displayed at the time of purchase. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may cancel your account at any time.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Kalahamoon is provided on an "as is" basis. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.

q1.q: How do I connect my WhatsApp?
q1.a: Go to Settings > Integrations > WhatsApp and follow the setup wizard to connect your WhatsApp Business account.

q2.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from Settings > Billing.

q3.q: How does the AI assistant work?
q3.a: The AI assistant automatically responds to customer messages based on your knowledge base and configured rules.

pricingPage.title: Enterprise pricing for sales teams
pricingPage.descriptionLead: Start with a {days}-day trial, then choose Starter, Growth, or Pro from the billing page after login.
pricingPage.descriptionTail: All paid plans include multilingual support and role-based permissions.
pricingPage.contactLeadIn: Need rollout help or a custom commercial agreement? Contact

extensionPage.title: Install Kalahamoon Extension manually today
extensionPage.description: Capture products from supported marketplaces, review the extracted data, and send it to WooCommerce, Shopify, Basalam, or your clipboard while the Chrome Web Store listing is being finalized.
extensionPage.manualHint: Use this file with Chrome's Load unpacked flow after extracting it on your computer.
extensionPage.storeHint: The public listing is not live yet. Manual installation is the supported path for now.
extensionPage.visualSubtitle: Right-click a product, review the extraction, then push it to your commerce stack.
extensionPage.installLead: This is the first supported installation path until the Chrome Web Store review is complete.

download.title: Download and extract
download.description: Download the Chrome package, unzip it, and keep the extracted folder somewhere stable. Chrome reads the extension directly from this folder.

developerMode.title: Open Chrome Extensions
developerMode.description: Go to chrome://extensions and turn on Developer mode from the top corner of the page.

loadUnpacked.title: Load unpacked folder
loadUnpacked.description: Click Load unpacked and select the extracted dist folder. Pin the extension from Chrome's toolbar for quicker access.

configure.title: Configure destinations
configure.description: Open the extension settings, enable the destinations you use, and add your WooCommerce, Shopify, Basalam, or clipboard settings.

features.capture: Capture product data from supported marketplace pages without copy-pasting.
features.review: Open a clean review screen before pushing any product into another channel.
features.route: Send products to WooCommerce, Shopify, Basalam API, or clipboard output.
features.control: Keep destinations disabled until their credentials are configured correctly.

extensionPage.comingSoonDescription: The Chrome Web Store listing is being prepared. Once approved, this page will switch the main action to one-click store installation while keeping manual setup as a backup path.

safe.a: Yes. It is the recommended path only while the Chrome Web Store listing is pending.

update.a: Download the newer package, replace the extracted folder, then press Reload on chrome://extensions.

where.a: Choose the extracted Chrome build folder, normally named dist, not the zip file itself.
